articles.title: Readers say their electric bills are ‘outrageously high.’ Here’s how much they pay.
articles.description:
Several respondents said they would switch to a municipal utilities provider if they had the option.

The post Readers say their electric bills are ‘outrageously high.’ Here’s how much they pay. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Residents report electric bills averaging over $200 monthly, citing financial strain.
Many express willingness to switch to municipal utilities for lower rates.
High bills could drive policy changes in Boston's energy providers.
